summary: Testing new Hemali features: Monthly Summary sub-tab and Party Ledger Hemali integration. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 3 sub-tabs working (Hemali Payments, Monthly Summary, Items Config). Monthly Summary shows sardar-wise data with items breakdown. Party Ledger has Hemali as a selectable party type.
critical_code_review_comments: Monthly Summary API correctly aggregates by sardar + month and only counts paid payments
Items breakdown shows quantity per item per sardar per month
current_advance_balance calculation is correct (new_advance - advance_deducted for paid payments)
Party Ledger correctly reads from hemali_payments collection with individual sardar names
Hemali entries excluded from 'Cash Party' section to avoid duplicates
PDF and Excel exports for monthly summary work correctly
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed items and payments for testing, cleanup performed via fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Monthly Summary and Party Ledger Hemali features fully functional. Existing sardars: Ramesh (2026-03) and Suresh (2026-02) visible in Monthly Summary. Party Ledger has Hemali as filterable party type showing individual sardar names.

monthly_summary_api.details: GET /api/hemali/monthly-summary returns sardar-wise monthly data with items_breakdown

monthly_summary_items_breakdown.details: items_breakdown shows quantity per item per month (e.g., 'Paddy Bag Unload: 150')

monthly_summary_sardar_filter.details: sardar_name query param filters results correctly

party_ledger_hemali_individual_sardars.details: GET /api/reports/party-ledger?party_type=Hemali shows individual sardar names (not generic 'Hemali Payment')

party_ledger_hemali_debit_credit.details: Hemali entries show correct credit (amount_paid) and debit (new_advance)

party_ledger_no_hemali_in_cash_party.details: Hemali entries excluded from party_type=cash_party to avoid duplicates

party_ledger_no_duplicates.details: All sardar entries are party_type='Hemali' only (no duplicate in other types)

frontend_3_subtabs.details: Hemali Payments, Monthly Summary, Items Config tabs all visible and working

frontend_monthly_summary_component.details: MonthlySummary component renders with sardar cards showing months, totals, items breakdown

frontend_monthly_summary_exports.details: PDF and Excel export buttons present with data-testid attributes

frontend_party_ledger_hemali_filter.details: Party Type dropdown includes Hemali option for filtering

ramesh_sample.items_breakdown: Paddy Bag Unload: 150, Rice Loading: 50, Gathan Loading: 100
